claim_text: 冇 participates in event/perfective predicate negation distinct from ordinary 唔.
limitation: Does not establish every topic or fragment environment.

claim_text: The exact three topic-negative surfaces occurred in one native family conversation.

claim_text: Exact 早知你坐佢架車咪仲好 occurred naturally.

claim_text: Exact 冇去到 occurred naturally in a nonattainment context.

claim_text: Exact 冇得去 occurred naturally in context.

claim_text: Duration can occur between V-咗 and an overt object.
limitation: Teaching reference; not an exhaustive theory.

claim_text: 完 contributes completion/endpoint meaning after a verb.
